_note: Spout cancel-directory — a MAINTAINED, curated dataset (merchant → cancellation channel/policy/script). It is NOT a live web crawl. The DECODE of your charge is live (Qwen); the channel it maps to comes from this file, with an honest one-tap pack fallback when a merchant is unknown. Real-merchant entries are best-effort and conservative; always follow the merchant's current on-screen steps. Demo merchants (NewsPlus, Streamflix, MealBoxes, RingtoneClub, CloudGym, PhotoApp) are fictionalised.

entries.name: Anytime Fitness
entries.policy: Most clubs require written notice (email or in-person) ~30 days before the next billing date; terms vary by franchise location.
entries.rights: Under the club membership contract's cancellation terms and applicable consumer-protection law, a member may cancel with written notice; the club must confirm the cancellation and final billing date in writing.
entries.script: Email member services (or your home club) with your name and membership; state you are cancelling effective end of the current billing period; request written confirmation of the final bill.

entries.name: iCloud+
entries.policy: Managed under Apple ID → Subscriptions / iCloud storage. Takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
entries.script: iPhone/iPad: Settings → your name → iCloud → Manage Account Storage → Change Storage Plan → Downgrade. Or Mac: System Settings → Apple ID → iCloud.

entries.name: NewsPlus
entries.policy: Digital news subscription; cancellable in writing effective end of cycle. (Demo merchant — fictionalised.)
entries.rights: Please confirm the cancellation and the final billing date in writing; I do not authorise further charges.
entries.script: Reply to your billing confirmation email asking to cancel effective end of cycle, and request written confirmation.

entries.name: Streamflix
entries.policy: Video streaming; cancel anytime, effective end of the paid period. (Demo merchant — fictionalised.)
entries.rights: Please cancel effective end of the current period and confirm in writing.
entries.script: Account → Membership → Cancel Membership. If billed on two cards, cancel the duplicate and keep one.

entries.name: MealBoxes
entries.policy: Meal-kit subscription; pausing does NOT stop billing — you must cancel the plan. (Demo merchant — fictionalised.)
entries.script: 1 · open account → plan → cancel plan  ·  2 · reason: “too expensive”  ·  3 · decline the pause offer, confirm

entries.name: RingtoneClub
entries.policy: Premium-SMS style micro-subscription; often cancel by texting STOP or by phone. Frequently an unrecognised 'gray' charge. (Demo merchant — fictionalised.)
entries.script: Text STOP to the shortcode on the charge, or call the number on your statement; ask them to stop all future billing and confirm.

entries.name: CloudGym
entries.policy: Free trial converting to paid ($19.99/mo) in 3 days. Cancel BEFORE the trial ends to avoid the first charge. (Demo merchant — fictionalised.)
entries.rights: I am cancelling before my free trial converts; please confirm no charge will be made.
entries.script: Cancel in-app before the trial end date, or email billing to confirm the trial will not convert.

entries.name: PhotoApp
entries.policy: Photo-editing subscription. Spout is unsure whether this one is needed — it will ASK, not guess. (Demo merchant — fictionalised.)
entries.script: Account → Subscription → Cancel. (Only after you confirm you don't need it.)

entries.name: Spotify
entries.policy: Premium reverts to free at the end of the paid period; no cancellation fee.
entries.script: spotify.com → Account → Available plans / Your plan → Cancel Premium → Confirm.

entries.name: Netflix
entries.policy: Cancel anytime; streaming continues to the end of the paid period.
entries.script: netflix.com → Account → Cancel Membership → Finish Cancellation.

entries.name: Amazon Prime
entries.policy: End membership from Prime Central; a pro-rated refund may apply if unused.
entries.script: Account → Prime membership → Update, cancel and more → End membership.

entries.name: YouTube Premium
entries.policy: Benefits continue until the end of the billing period.
entries.script: youtube.com → your avatar → Purchases and memberships → Manage → Cancel.

entries.name: Adobe Creative Cloud
entries.policy: Annual plans cancelled early may incur an early-termination fee (up to 50% of remaining term).
entries.script: account.adobe.com → Plans → Manage plan → Cancel your plan.

entries.name: Planet Fitness
entries.policy: Usually cancel in-club or by certified mail; some locations allow app cancellation.
entries.script: Visit your home club to cancel, or send written notice by certified mail; keep the receipt.

entries.name: Audible
entries.policy: Cancel from membership settings; unused credits may be forfeited.

entries.name: The New York Times
entries.policy: Online cancellation often routes to a chat/phone confirmation for some plans.
entries.script: Account → Manage subscription → Cancel; complete the chat/phone confirmation if prompted.
